---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Notes on mathematics, statistics, books, music, and miscellaneous thoughts."
image: images/belkahia.jpg
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  categories: true
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  grid-item-border: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="painting-section" style="border-top:none; margin-top:0; padding-top:0;">
  <img src="images/belkahia.jpg" class="featured-painting" alt="Farid Belkahia, Main, 1980">
  <div class="painting-caption">
    Farid Belkahia, <em>Main</em>, henné sur peau, 1980.
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="subscribe-box">
  <div class="subscribe-text">
    <span class="subscribe-icon">&#9993;</span>
    If you'd like to hear when I post something new, leave your email below. No spam, just occasional notes on maths, statistics, books, music, and whatever else I happen to be thinking about.
  </div>
  <form
    action="https://buttondown.com/api/emails/embed-subscribe/mehdikhribch"
    method="post"
    target="popupwindow"
    onsubmit="window.open('https://buttondown.com/mehdikhribch', 'popupwindow')"
    class="subscribe-form"
  >
    <input type="email" name="email" placeholder="your@email.com" required class="subscribe-input" />
    <button type="submit" class="subscribe-btn">Subscribe</button>
  </form>
</div>
```
